description: High-performance dual-band home access point with Wi-Fi 6 technology, designed for advanced users. This latest model is equipped with a powerful quad-core ARM processor running at 2.2 GHz, allowing it to handle increased traffic. With 4x4 MIMO technology, it provides up to double the data transfer speed compared to standard dual-channel devices, ensuring a fast and reliable network capable of supporting even the most demanding tasks. To fully utilize its capabilities, a device supporting these… Equipped with 5 Gigabit Ethernet ports (with PoE-OUT on the 5th port), a USB 3.0 port, and robust 1GB RAM, the Chateau PROax excels at handling complex firewall rules and hardware encryption. The device supports advanced WPA3 encryption for enhanced security, while its external antennas provide excellent wireless range and beamforming performance. It operates on the 2.4 and 5 GHz bands, achieving maximum theoretical throughput of 1148 Mb/s and 2402 Mb/s. The pre-installed RouterOS v7 with L6… Device Power adapter (48 V / 1.35 A)
